problem id: 2b3e06c9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2)

examples:
  10010111 -> 00100101
  00101100 -> 00001011
  01011100 -> 00010111
  00010000 -> 00000100
  01111000 -> 00011110
  11000000 -> 00110000
  11000110 -> 00110001
  01100111 -> 00011001

query: 11111100
predicted answer: 00111111
